records.ety: [L. emendare; e out + menda, mendum, fault, blemish: cf. F. mender. Cf. Amend, Mend.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Emended; p. pr. & vb. n. Emending.]

defs: To purge of faults; to make better; to correct; esp., to make corrections in (a literary work); to alter for the better by textual criticism, generally verbal.
